faroo.name: Faroo Liquid Staking
faroo._note: ERC-4626 style. Responds to totalAssets(), totalSupply(), decimals()=18. APY requires two totalAssets() snapshots separated by time (see yield-scan.md#faroo-apy).

morpho.name: Morpho
morpho._verified: eth_getCode = 0x for all Morpho deterministic addresses on chain 688689
morpho._note: Morpho UI lists Pharos as a 'supported' chain, but their API (blue-api.morpho.org) returns 'unsupported chainId 688689'. Neither Morpho Blue (0xBBBB...Cb) nor VaultV2Factory are deployed on Atlantic testnet. Likely planned for mainnet. Get active vault addresses from https://app.morpho.org once live.

elfi.name: ELFi Protocol
elfi._verified: ELFi deploys only on Arbitrum (0x153c...55) and Base (0x957e...50). Both NOT DEPLOYED on Pharos testnet.
elfi._note: ELFi is a decentralized derivatives trading platform, NOT an RWA lending protocol. It does not appear to have Pharos deployment. Remove from yield-router or replace with an actual Pharos RWA protocol once one is found.

morpho.name: Morpho
morpho._note: Morpho docs list Pharos among supported chains, but chain 1672 is absent from their API. Verify with eth_getCode on https://rpc.pharos.xyz before use.

faroo.name: Faroo Liquid Staking
faroo._note: Testnet address 0xc9A0B63d91c2A808dD631d031f037944fedDaA12 is Atlantic testnet only. Mainnet address not confirmed.
